sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102527" key="taurafe/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ταυρ-αφέτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n102527.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the one who releases the bull</tr_> at a bull-fight, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">LW</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">499</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Caryanda</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
